meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to design with AI, leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster, and ship professional SaaS apps with ease.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors and logic traps. By shifting your workflow to AI-assisted design, you treat code as a modular output rather than a manual chore. Use Antigravity to architect the UI logic and Claude Code to execute the debugging, turning hours of frustration into minutes of verified, production-ready code.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen at 2:00 AM. The client needs a feature deployed by morning, but your code is throwing an obscure runtime error that mocks your intelligence. We have all been there—lost in a labyrinth of stack traces, burning billable hours on problems that shouldn't exist.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By integrating AI into your design phase, you move from being a 'code-fixer' to a 'systems architect.' This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about building a resilient foundation where the AI handles the heavy lifting of verification, allowing you to focus on high-value delivery and client satisfaction.

steps.title: Architect the Logic in Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, map your state management and data flow in Antigravity to prevent logic errors before they start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust state architecture for a SaaS dashboard, focusing on error-prone API data fetching and handling empty states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal: 'generate boilerplate based on the Antigravity architecture schema'

steps.title: Automated Code Review with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan your current directory for potential bottlenecks or common anti-patterns that lead to debugging nightmares.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this component for potential race conditions during async state updates.

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with AI-Driven Scaffolding
steps.description: When a bug hits, don't hunt through the whole file. Ask Claude Code to create a minimal reproduction case to isolate the issue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test harness that isolates the authentication logic to verify the token refresh cycle.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a test script to isolate auth-token-refresh logic'

steps.title: Refactor for Readability
steps.description: Often, bugs are caused by overly complex functions. Use AI to refactor your code into clean, modular, and debuggable segments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this legacy function into a clean, functional pattern using TypeScript best practices.

steps.title: Automated Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure your fix doesn't break other features by having Claude Code write and run unit tests for your new modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Jest unit tests for the newly refactored API service, covering success and failure scenarios.

pro_tips: Treat your Antigravity schema as the 'Source of Truth'; if the AI suggests code that deviates from the schema, force a regeneration.
Use Claude Code's '--diff' mode to review changes line-by-line; never blindly accept AI patches.
Maintain a 'context.md' file in your repo; Claude Code uses this to understand your project's specific conventions and avoid repetitive errors.
When debugging complex state, ask the AI to 'explain the state flow as a sequence diagram' before asking for a code fix.
Always run your own manual integration test after an AI-suggested fix; AI is great at syntax, but you are the master of user experience.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI tools into your daily workflow for one week, then document your time-saved metrics to show clients your increased efficiency.
content.conversion_block: Stop shipping bugs and start scaling your freelance business with a modern, AI-powered tech stack. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
